---
pagetitle: "Publications & Presentations | Alan J. Figueroa Ruiz"
toc: true
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-hero}
# Publications & Presentations

Manuscripts, conference presentations, posters, protocols, and public-facing research outputs.
:::

::: {.section-block}

## Output pathways

::: {.gateway-grid}

::: {.gateway-card}
### Manuscripts

Peer-reviewed papers and manuscript drafts connected to my research projects.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Presentations

Conference talks, symposium presentations, invited talks, and posters.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Protocols

Field, laboratory, and computational workflows linked to repositories and protocols.io.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Public outputs

Accessible summaries, outreach materials, and community-facing science communication.
:::

:::
:::

::: {.section-block}

## Manuscripts in preparation

::: {.publication-card}
### First epidemiological assessment of *Toxoplasma gondii* serological testing in Puerto Rico

**Working title:** First epidemiological assessment of *Toxoplasma gondii* serological testing in Puerto Rico: an analysis of NBS human diagnostic records

This manuscript uses human diagnostic testing records from Puerto Rico to characterize *Toxoplasma gondii* exposure patterns across demographic, diagnostic, and regional variables.

**Status:** In preparation  
**Research areas:** Epidemiology · One Health · Public health · Reproducible R analysis
:::

:::

::: {.section-block}

## Conference presentations

::: {.publication-card}
### First Epidemiological Evidence of Human *Toxoplasma gondii* Exposure in Puerto Rico: a Retrospective Analysis of Diagnostic Records

**Authors:** Alan J. Figueroa Ruiz, Héctor G. Reyes Delgado, Karina S. Tapia Ortiz, and Alex J. Veglia  

**Event:** Biology Symposium, University of Puerto Rico at Mayagüez  
**Format:** Oral presentation  
**Status:** Presented / in development for manuscript expansion
:::

:::

::: {.section-block}

## Planned outputs

- Peer-reviewed manuscripts
- Conference presentations
- Scientific posters
- Reproducible workflows
- Protocol documents
- Public-facing research summaries
- Project-specific GitHub repositories

:::
